name: document_upload
description: Upload one or more documents to an existing translation project. Supports 280+ file formats including Office documents, JSON, HTML, XLIFF, and more.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project ID to upload documents to.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: The document file(s) to upload. Use multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: documentModel
parameters.description: JSON configuration for the documents (can be empty {}).

request_example.body: FormData with document file(s) and optional JSON configuration
